title: Board Activity - Approver
excerpt: I have a board with workflows that moves a request through an approval process.  One of my Groups has 3 approvers set to it.  Only one of the 3 approvers is needed for it to move to the next step, but I’m having difficul…

posts.author: Sean777 (Sean )
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a board with workflows that moves a request through an approval process. One of my Groups has 3 approvers set to it. Only one of the 3 approvers is needed for it to move to the next step, but I’m having difficulty providing a report to finance that shows which of the 3 was the approver. I know I can see who approved it in the activity section, but is thier any way to create an update to show who was the approver?

Thanks,

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Sean! What do you think about using the Last Updated column here? Would that work or are people making changes to the item even after the status changes to ‘Approved’?
